28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Preparation
Mantra:
“Perfection Is The Enemy Of Progress.”
You do not need a perfect product—you need a product
Focus on making your information solid, but do not try to make your
information complete (Dr. K’s One-Page Book)
Failure online comes from feeling as if you are (a) not qualified or
educated enough; (b) trying to be perfect…
AND:

-- 1 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Preparation
Writing Or Recording Before Asking Permission
(Tap into what your audience already wants to hear.)
We will cover discovering your passion next, but first you must
understand that your passion may not be the passion of others.
Even more often than this, one’s passion is not spoken in the
language others need to hear.
Truly great product creators learn their prospect’s preferred modality of
influence, and create accordingly. This is 50% of the battle!

-- 2 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 1-3
Select A Topic And Qualify It Via Surveying Prospective Buyers
YOUR GOAL
Conceptualizing a sellable product that focuses on the needs and
desires of the masses, while tapping into your personal interests
and/or expertise.

-- 3 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 1-3
STEP 1
Spend part of day one asking yourself this question:
If I had to teach something for free, what would it be?
Assuming this is something that has an audience, you’ve just
discovered the foundation of your product.
From there, we'll get into which aspect of this foundation you will be
focusing on…but, guess what?
That is not your decision—it’s the decision of your potential buyers.

-- 4 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 1-3
STEP 2
How To Go About Finding “That” Product/Service: Survey The Masses
Tip 1: Google Keyword Research Tool
Create a Gmail account, and then follow these steps:
1. Go to adwords.google.com
2. Click “Tools And Analysis/Keyword Planner”
3. Search for New Keyword and Ad Group Ideas
4. Type in the topic you are interested in surveying
5. Click “Keyword Ideas” tab
6. Look for medium to high keywords (for ideas on positioning)

-- 5 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 1-3
STEP 2
How To Go About Finding “That” Product/Service: Survey The Masses
Tip 2: Survey friends, social groups like church, Facebook…however,
people that are strangers are preferable (they speak truth unedited!)
Take a field of study you are versed in, or even highly interested in,
and survey these people.
Tip 3: Create a product from the perspective of someone who is going
through the problem or challenge your potential product addresses
(The Anti-Guru Effect)

-- 6 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 1-3
STEP 2
How To Go About Finding “That” Product/Service: Survey The Masses
Tip 4: Create a product based upon your own challenges and/or
desires to achieve X by reviewing 5-10 of the most popular books on
the subject, and lining up expert interviews.
These experts need not be world-famous; they can simply
be success stories others can relate to.
Take-away: Create A Solution In A Field
You Love That Others Find Valuable

-- 7 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 1-3
STEP 2
How To Go About Finding “That” Product/Service: Survey The Masses
Myth #1
“Everyone will love my treatise on the African beetle!”
Myth #2
Credentials And Expertise Are Required
Myth #3
“But I already know my prospect’s greatest need!”

-- 8 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 4
Decide On The Medium
YOUR GOAL
Determine the best medium (digital, print, video, audio, etc.) for your
message and for your audience based on their feedback

-- 9 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 4
NOTES
Do not limit yourself to an “e-book”
Record your product rather than writing it
Use multiple mediums (more products, more profit)
Use video and audio versions as up-sells (easier than you think)

-- 10 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 5-7
Research
YOUR GOAL
Discover trending ideas related to your chosen topic and dig deeper
into current studies, findings, data, research, your competition (huge),
Facebook and YouTube-related competition (to see how others are
packaging their message successfully), and so on.

-- 11 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 5-7
STEP 1
Create A Pros and Cons List
This will serve to help you search out reputable sources that both support and
rebut nay-saying claims against your subject of interest.
Remember, a good book, audio, video, service or webinar product deals with
ALL facets of the topic at hand, including the cons.
Tip 1: Find legitimate cons and include them in your product/service and sales
materials to add realism.
Tip 2: Never write above a 7th Grade Level (there are exceptions)

-- 12 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 5-7
STEP 2
Purchase Your Competition’s Materials
See what else you can learn, and how they present their data.
You never want to plagiarize, but getting ideas for how chapters can flow, as
well as simply learning more about the subject, will do nothing but help your
product end up that much better.
The Jordan Belfort Example

-- 13 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 5-7
STEP 3
Record (or write) All Research Down
If recording, have it transcribed. Transcription services are as inexpensive as
$1 per page overseas.
Get the highlights without editing ‘anything’ (editing kills flow; flow is the
champion of expedient progress.) Exception: If you are in a creative flow.
Anything you need to look up later, mark with “TK” (to come)
Neil Strauss 25% Rule

-- 14 of 18 --

28-Day Product Creation Formula
28 Days From Conception To Cash
Week 1: Days 5-7
FINAL NOTES
Notice you are only taking a few days to do this. You are not creating an
exhaustive treatise on a subject, nor are you writing an historical autobiography
that demands months or years of data collection.
All data needed for an info product from a research perspective can
be gathered in a few days.
The rest of the work will be your experiences with the topic, your thoughts on
the data, how others are using whatever methods you're discussing, and so on.

-- 15 of 18 --

Week 2 Highlights Include…
The 7-Day Book Writing Formula
Exactly how to outline every chapter and write a book using
the most user-friendly strategies in less than 7 days!
Recording Your Product
The specific steps on how to record your product so you
end up with not one but three sellable versions!
Title And Branding Tricks
Designed to get you indexed in Google ASAP!
AND MORE!
